descriptionZh: 网页、应用、操作系统、游戏、可视化算法和其他软件平台里的 Bad Apple!!。
descriptionEn: Bad Apple!! implemented in websites, apps, operating systems, games, algorithms, and other software platforms.

descriptionZh: 显示器、电子器件、复古设备、外设、控制器和其他实体硬件实现。
descriptionEn: Displays, electronic parts, vintage machines, peripherals, controllers, and other physical hardware implementations.

descriptionZh: 翻唱、演奏、编曲、MIDI、AI 声音和偏音频侧的实现。
descriptionEn: Covers, performances, arrangements, MIDI, AI vocals, and audio-focused implementations.

descriptionZh: 自然物、食物、纸张、手绘、定格动画和非电子实体材料。
descriptionEn: Nature, food, paper, drawing, stop motion, and non-electronic physical materials.

descriptionZh: PV、影绘、MMD、同人动画、字幕视频和角色相关二创。
descriptionEn: PV, shadow art, MMD, fan animation, lyric videos, and character-focused derivative works.

descriptionZh: 合辑、逐帧切换、多版本混剪、递归和以 Bad Apple!! 传播本身为对象的作品。
descriptionEn: Compilations, frame switching, multi-version edits, recursive works, and pieces about the meme itself.

descriptionZh: 自动规则没有足够信号，需要人工确认的条目。
descriptionEn: Entries where automatic rules do not have enough signal and need manual review.
